executive_summary: The global risk profile remains stable despite elevated informational noise in the East Asian sector. While media anxiety in Taiwan diverges from actual physical movements, supply chains and fuel reserves continue to operate within acceptable parameters. The network must monitor the high artificial intelligence valuation index as capital flows potentially overexpose technology sectors.
correlations: The divergence between Taiwanese media anxiety and physical changes highlights an asymmetric psychological operations environment that has not yet destabilised physical supply chains.
